name: Bhu Master
meta_title: Case Study: Bhu Master | Real Estate & Construction Marketplace
meta_desc: How Trai Inc built a unified property listing, professional network, and material sourcing platform for India's real estate market.

hero.title: One app for every step of buying, building, and selling property
hero.subtitle: Bhu Master needed a single platform to unify property listings, professional networking, and material sourcing for India's real estate and construction market.

challenge.title: Property, professionals, and materials — scattered across different platforms.
challenge.body: Buyers, sellers, and builders in the real estate and construction space were relying on fragmented tools — one app for listings, another for finding contractors, manual calls for material sourcing. Bhu Master needed a single, unified experience.

solution.title: A unified marketplace, built from the ground up.

features.title: Property Discovery
features.desc: Search, filter, and browse verified listings — apartments, plots, commercial spaces.

features.title: Professional Network
features.desc: Connect with architects, engineers, interior designers, and legal advisors — all in one place.

features.title: Material Sourcing
features.desc: Post material requirements and get competitive quotes from vendors directly in the app.

result.title: Live on Android & iOS.
result.body: Bhu Master is now live on the Google Play Store and App Store, giving property buyers, sellers, and construction professionals a single platform to manage their entire journey.

cta.title: Have a similar project in mind?
